entity_types.name: Legal_Entity
entity_types.description: A company, trust, partnership, or other entity with legal personhood.
entity_types.plain_description: A business or legal body that can own assets and enter agreements.
entity_types.example_snippet: Acme Holdings LLC, a Delaware limited liability company
entity_types.seed_alignment: Aligned to FIBO LegalPerson; entity_form covers Corporation/Trust/Partnership/LLC subclasses.

entity_types.name: Insurance_Policy
entity_types.description: An insurance contract covering one or more insured parties or assets.
entity_types.plain_description: A policy document that insures people, property, or liability.

relationships.name: owns_interest_in
relationships.description: A parent entity holds an ownership interest in a subsidiary.
relationships.plain_description: One company owns part or all of another.
relationships.example_snippet: Acme Holdings owns 60% of Acme Realty
relationships.richness_rationale: Carries an ownership_percentage property, so it is attributed, not a simple edge.

relationships.name: names_insured
relationships.description: A policy names a legal entity as an insured party.
relationships.plain_description: Links a policy to the entity it protects.
relationships.example_snippet: Policy AB123 names Acme Realty as insured
relationships.richness_rationale: No edge attributes needed beyond the link itself.
